meaning: n.敲诈,勒索vt.赎回,勒索赎金
examples: Her kidnapper extorted a $175,000 ransom for her release.
He is charged with kidnapping a businessman last year and holding him for ransom.
Hive them in the cave till they raise a ransom.
Twenty-five people were arrested in 2009 over the kidnapping of some 16 wealthy Bulgarians for ransom.
In 2009, 480 people were officially recognised as having been kidnapped for ransom in Pakistan.
